data.title: Vitalik Buterin advocates for improved decentralized stablecoins to combat inflation, governance risks, and institutional control in crypto.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin has expressed concerns about the current dollar-pegged stablecoins, stating that they are exposing the crypto market to risks such as inflation, governance capture, and institutional control. His remarks highlight potential vulnerabilities in stablecoins linked to fiat currencies that could impact the stability and decentralization of the crypto ecosystem. This warning comes as stablecoins have grown in popularity and value, with a total market capitalization exceeding $100 billion, raising questions about their long-term sustainability and resilience in the face of external pressures. Buterin's critique underscores the need for innovation and careful consideration in the development and regulation of stablecoins to ensure the integrity of the broader cryptocurrency market.

data.title: DIRTT announces Rich Hunter's departure as President and COO and Aaron Merkin joining as new CTO on Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on January 12, 2026, DIRTT, a leading industrialized construction firm, revealed changes in its executive team. Rich Hunter, the former President and COO, has left the Company. Simultaneously, Aaron Merkin has been appointed as the new Chief Technology Officer. These changes are effective as of January 12, 2026.(DIRTT’s trading symbols: TSX: DRT; OTCQX: DRTTF)

data.title: Acer sues AT&T, Verizon, and T-Mobile for patent infringement in Texas court - claims companies used their technology.
data.description: A global technology manufacturer, Acer, has initiated individual patent infringement lawsuits against AT&T, Verizon, and T-Mobile. The legal actions were filed in the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Texas, citing violations of six U.S. patents related to pivotal advancements in cellular networking technology. Acer had previously engaged in licensing negotiations with the cellular companies but resorted to legal recourse on January 9. The lawsuits seek compensation for unauthorized utilization of Acer's patented technology.

data.title: Concentric Energy Advisors in Marlborough, MA promotes employees in 2026, celebrating excellence and leadership.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Marlborough, Massachusetts, Concentric Energy Advisors, Inc. and Concentric Advisors ULC (collectively referred to as "Concentric"), renowned for their expertise in providing management consulting services to the energy and water sectors in North America, have revealed a new set of initiatives.

data.title: PG&E coworkers fund over $300,000 in scholarships for Northern and Central California students. Apply by Feb. 28.
data.description: The deadline to submit applications is February 28, 2026, in Oakland, California. On January 12, 2026, Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) revealed that they are currently receiving scholarship applications from high school students planning to attend college, as well as current college students and those pursuing continuing education.

data.title: Else Nutrition Holdings Inc. (TSX: BABY) (OTCQX: BABYF) (FSE: 0YL) confirms resolutions passed at annual general meeting on Dec 29, 2025.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Vancouver, BC, ELSE NUTRITION HOLDINGS INC. disclosed that during its annual general meeting on December 29, 2025, all proposals presented to shareholders received approval. The company's stock symbols include TSX: BABY, OTCQX: BABYF, and FSE: 0YL. The successful meeting indicates unanimity among shareholders regarding important decisions.

data.title: US housing affordability crisis due to demand surpassing supply, affecting all types of housing. Trump admin praised for commitment to reduce costs.
data.description: An escalating housing affordability crisis is plaguing the United States, driven by an imbalance of demand and supply. This shortage encompasses various types of housing such as homes for sale, rent, apartments, and duplexes, and has been developing over many years. Many families and communities nationwide have been grappling with the significant expenses associated with housing. Various organizations acknowledge the Trump Administration's efforts towards decreasing housing expenses and expanding access to accommodation.

data.title: TSM stock mispriced but buoyant ahead of earnings, facing buy-the-rumor, sell-the-news scenario, possibly stretched valuations. Contrarian profile includes more recent down weeks indicating uncertainty.\OptionsResolver favor positive speculation.Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: TSM (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd) is gearing up for a record-breaking quarter ahead of its earnings release. Investors are optimistic and have been bidding up TSM stock, possibly setting up a classic buy-the-rumor, sell-the-news scenario. However, the stock has recently had more down weeks than up weeks, indicating some caution in the market. Despite concerns of potential post-earnings disappointments impacting highly volatile tech stocks, TSM is viewed as having a contrarian risk profile and not being "priced for perfection." This different risk profile, along with positive quantitative signals, suggests potential for further upside in the stock. For more details, the full article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ormat Technologies secures 20-year PPA with Switch for around 13MW of geothermal power to fuel data centers.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been stated that a total of 340 people have been affected by the outbreak of a viral illness in the city. The local health department has confirmed that 72 individuals have been hospitalized due to the illness, with 15 of them currently in critical condition. Additionally, the authorities have disclosed that the viral illness has resulted in three fatalities so far. Investigations are ongoing to determine the cause of the outbreak and to prevent further spread of the illness in the community.

data.title: Parex Resources updates production and abandons Guapo-1 exploration well at VIM-1. Information in USD.
data.description: Calgary-based Parex Resources Inc. disclosed on January 12, 2026, a production update and revealed the abandonment of the Guapo-1 exploration well at VIM-1 (with a 50% Working Interest). The company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as PXT, provided the announcement in United States Dollars.

data.title: TKO Miller facilitated the sale of SÜDPACK's U.S. operations to PPC Flex, a top flexible packaging company.
data.description: In Milwaukee on January 12, 2026, TKO Miller, a prominent middle market investment bank, revealed the acquisition of the U.S. operations of SÜDPACK by PPC Flex. SÜDPACK, a renowned provider of high-performance films and innovative packaging solutions, will now be under the ownership of PPC Flex, a key player in North American flexible packaging. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry.

data.title: Teneo expands in Asia-Pacific by acquiring PwC NZ's BRS unit, adding 22 professionals, following last year's buyout of PwC Australia.
data.description: Teneo's Financial Advisory division in Asia-Pacific is undergoing a considerable growth, as they welcome 22 professionals from New Zealand. This development follows Teneo's acquisition of PwC Australia's Business Restructuring Services unit in the previous year. In addition, Teneo is planning to establish new offices in Auckland, Wellington, and other locations for further expansion.

data.title: Summit Hotel Properties will announce Q4 and FY 2025 earnings on Feb 25, 2026 after market close.
data.description: Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. disclosed that it is set to reveal its financial results for Q4 and FY 2025 on February 25, 2026, post-market closure. The company operates under the stock symbol NYSE: INN and is headquartered in Austin, Texas. This announcement signifies a crucial disclosure for stakeholders and investors, allowing a glimpse into the organization's performance during the outlined periods. Interested parties await the forthcoming data to make informed decisions based on the numbers provided.

data.title: GDIT wins $988M contract to upgrade Navy C5ISR systems on ships to counter evolving threats.
data.description: General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT), a division of General Dynamics (NYSE:GD), has secured a contract on January 12, 2026, to implement cutting-edge systems on all surface combatant vessels. The company aims to proactively address evolving threats by integrating advanced technologies. This move is part of General Dynamics' strategy to enhance the capabilities of its naval fleet in response to emerging security challenges.
